task: Submit training stage clarification questions with Enter across Day 1 and future stages

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires real verification before reporting done, and code or UI changes require completion evidence.
Code, deploy, UI, and customer-facing changes require real entrypoint verification and completion evidence guard.

changes: Added Enter-to-submit and Shift+Enter newline behavior to the non-Day-0 concept question textarea.
Connected the stage concept question field to the existing LLM coach request path, including loading, duplicate-answer, error, and answer display states.
Generalized the concept block, detail preview, stage labels, stage ordering, and stage unlock logic so Day 2, Day 3, and later stages receive the same behavior when present in training state.
